optimistic_write_without_verification: Confirm whether the Write tool errors are permission-related or path-existence-related — if path-existence, a pre-Write Bash existence check is a one-line fix that would eliminate the 2-failure-then-check sequence entirely; this is the most tractable of the recurring patterns given its narrow blast radius
